form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Temora, recording a solid 18.84 over the 330m journey. Can measure up again if runs up to that effort.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 525m at this track clocking 30.90. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 525m at this track clocking 30.90. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (33.43) when third at Temora in a Grade 5. Placed at all two starts from this draw. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (33.43) when third at Temora in a Grade 5. Placed at all two starts from this draw. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Finished second last time (18.75) over 320m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last time (18.75) over 320m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at Wentworth Park last time when a 3.5 lengths third but did record an outstanding 29.74 for the 520m trip. Among the each way chances if runs up to latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at Wentworth Park last time when a 3.5 lengths third but did record an outstanding 29.74 for the 520m trip. Among the each way chances if runs up to latest.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 3.5 lengths in 18.37, beating Bianca's Eyelash. Last start finished 4th over 320m at this track beaten 8 lengths (19.19) behind Phoenix Umbrella in a Grade 5 on April 10. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 525m. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.
